title: G Global transaction
text: G Global transaction Enable transaction manager logon. Modes None. Conditions The DBMS driver has to be TM-capable, ( TMCapable ). The current path must be TM-controlled and the driver logon request must not have been sent. Description This request provides Uniface with the DBMS-specific information that the transaction manager needs in order to log on to the DBMS. Refer to: Uniface Database I/O Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
